name: Capella Minerals Limited
description: Capella Minerals Limited is a Canadian gold and copper exploration and development company. The company is focused on the acquisition, exploration, and development of quality mineral properties in favorable jurisdictions, with a primary focus on high-grade gold and copper projects in Northern Europe (specifically Norway and Finland) and Canada. Its key assets include the Hessjøgruva copper-zinc-cobalt project and the Kjøli copper project in Norway, as well as the Northern Finland Gold-Copper project.
